examples: See what the Diet Detective had to say about Amaranth here.
Exotic grains such as amaranth, quinoa, teff, millet, and Kamut are going mainstream.
And look at the high nutritional content of some other forgotten but powerful grains, like quinoa and amaranth.
The State of Connecticut lent a hand, too, calling in-state employers to help place Amaranth people locally.
There will be more debacles like the now notorious Amaranth Advisors before this inflation unwinds.
